text.value: @concat('UPDATE [dbo].[tbl_integration_batch] SET [current_stage] = ''Promote To Staging'', [batch_status] = ''Promoting'', [updated_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHERE [batch_id] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''');')

@concat('DELETE FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_lines_staging] WHERE [batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, '''); DELETE FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] WHERE [batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, '''); DELETE FROM [dbo].[tbl_integration_delivery_group] WHERE [batch_id] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, '''); DELETE FROM [dbo].[tbl_integration_ess_request] WHERE [batch_id] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, '''); DELETE FROM [dbo].[tbl_integration_document_status] WHERE [batch_id] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, '''); DELETE FROM [dbo].[tbl_source_notification_table] WHERE [batch_id] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') AND [process_stage] = ''VALIDATION'';')

@concat(
'INSERT INTO [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] (
    [Business Unit],
    [Source],
    [Invoice Number],
    [Invoice Amount],
    [Invoice Date],
    [Supplier Name],
    [Supplier Number],
    [Supplier Site],
    [Invoice Currency],
    [Payment Currency],
    [Description],
    [Invoice Type],
    [Legal Entity],
    [Payment Terms],
    [Accounting Date],
    [Tax Control Amount],
    [Attribute 2],
    [ValidationStatus],
    [Processed_bit],
    [processed_at],
    [validation_reason],
    [batchId],
    [MetadataUniqueIdentifies],
    [source_system],
    [entity_name],
    [ledger_id],
    [invoice_status],
    [Liability Combination]
)
SELECT
    v.[bu_name],
    COALESCE(v.[source], ''', pipeline().parameters.p_source_system, '''),
    v.[invoice_number],
    v.[invoice_amount],
    v.[invoice_date],
    v.[supplier_name],
    v.[supplier_number],
    v.[supplier_site_code],
    v.[invoice_currency_code],
    v.[invoice_currency_code],
    v.[description],
    v.[invoice_type],
    bu.[LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME],
    v.[payment_term],
    v.[accounting_date],
    v.[tax_control_amount],
    v.[source_transaction_reference],
    v.[validation_status],
    0,
    NULL,
    v.[validation_reason],
    TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, '''),
    CONCAT(
        COALESCE(v.[source], ''', pipeline().parameters.p_source_system, '''), ''|'',
        COALESCE(v.[bu_name], ''''), ''|'',
        COALESCE(v.[invoice_number], ''''), ''|'',
        COALESCE(v.[supplier_number], '''')
    ),
    ''', pipeline().parameters.p_source_system, ''',
    ''', pipeline().parameters.p_entity_name, ''',
    bu.[LEDGER_ID],
    ''Ready For Delivery'',
    v.[liability_account]
FROM [dbo].[vw_softco_ap_invoice_header_transformed] v
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT TOP (1)
        bd.[LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME],
        bd.[LEDGER_ID]
    FROM [dbo].[tbl_bu_details] bd
    WHERE UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME]))) = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(v.[bu_name])))
    ORDER BY bd.[LEDGER_ID], bd.[LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME], bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME]
) bu
WHERE ISNULL(v.[validation_status], '''') = ''Validation Success'';
')

@concat(
'WITH raw_header_map AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(CAST(hr.[caseId] AS nvarchar(255)))), '''') AS case_id,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(CAST(hr.[invoiceNumber] AS nvarchar(255)))), '''') AS invoice_number,
        bu.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME] AS business_unit_name
    FROM [dbo].[tbl_softco_ap_invoice_header_raw] hr
    OUTER APPLY (
        SELECT TOP (1) bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME]
        FROM [dbo].[tbl_bu_details] bd
        WHERE UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME]))) = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(hr.[organisation])))
           OR UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_CODE]))) = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(hr.[organisation])))
        ORDER BY bd.[LEDGER_ID], bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME], bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_CODE]
    ) bu
),
line_source AS (
    SELECT l.*, m.business_unit_name
    FROM [dbo].[vw_softco_ap_invoice_line_transformed] l
    LEFT JOIN raw_header_map m
        ON m.case_id = l.case_id
        AND m.invoice_number = l.invoice_number
)
INSERT INTO [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_lines_staging] (
    [Invoice ID],
    [Line Number],
    [Line Type],
    [Amount],
    [Description],
    [Distribution Combination],
    [Accounting Date],
    [Tax Rate Code],
    [Tax Rate],
    [Project Number],
    [Task Number],
    [Expenditure Type],
    [Contract Number],
    [ValidationStatus],
    [Processed_bit],
    [processed_at],
    [validation_reason],
    [batchId],
    [MetadataUniqueIdentifies],
    [source_system],
    [entity_name],
    [ledger_id],
    [invoice_status],
    [PO Number],
    [PO Line Number],
    [Receipt Number]
)
SELECT
    h.[Invoice ID],
    l.[line_number],
    l.[line_type],
    l.[line_amount],
    l.[line_description],
    l.[distribution_combination],
    l.[accounting_date],
    l.[tax_rate_name],
    l.[vat_percentage],
    l.[project],
    l.[task],
    l.[exp_type],
    l.[award],
    l.[validation_status],
    0,
    NULL,
    l.[validation_reason],
    TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, '''), 
    CONCAT(h.[MetadataUniqueIdentifies], ''|'', COALESCE(l.[line_number], '''')),
    ''', pipeline().parameters.p_source_system, ''',
    ''', pipeline().parameters.p_entity_name, ''',
    h.[ledger_id],
    ''Ready For Delivery'',
    l.order_number,
    l.order_item_number,
    l.receipt_number
FROM line_source l
INNER JOIN [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] h
    ON h.[batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''')
    AND h.[Invoice Number] = l.[invoice_number]
    AND ISNULL(h.[Business Unit], '''') = ISNULL(l.business_unit_name, '''')
WHERE ISNULL(l.[validation_status], '''') = ''Validation Success'';
')

@concat('WITH raw_header_map AS ( SELECT DISTINCT NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(CAST(hr.[caseId] AS nvarchar(255)))), '''') AS case_id, NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(CAST(hr.[invoiceNumber] AS nvarchar(255)))), '''') AS invoice_number, bu.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME] AS business_unit_name FROM [dbo].[tbl_softco_ap_invoice_header_raw] hr OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP (1) bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME] FROM [dbo].[tbl_bu_details] bd WHERE UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME]))) = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(hr.[organisation]))) OR UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_CODE]))) = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(hr.[organisation]))) ORDER BY bd.[LEDGER_ID], bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME], bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_CODE] ) bu ), failed_invoice AS ( SELECT DISTINCT h.[batchId], h.[Invoice ID] FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] h INNER JOIN raw_header_map m ON ISNULL(m.[invoice_number], '''') = ISNULL(h.[Invoice Number], '''') AND ISNULL(m.[business_unit_name], '''') = ISNULL(h.[Business Unit], '''') INNER JOIN [dbo].[vw_softco_ap_invoice_line_transformed] l ON l.[case_id] = m.[case_id] AND l.[invoice_number] = m.[invoice_number] WHERE h.[batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') AND ISNULL(l.[validation_status], '''') <> ''Validation Success'' ) DELETE l FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_lines_staging] l INNER JOIN failed_invoice f ON f.[batchId] = l.[batchId] AND f.[Invoice ID] = l.[Invoice ID]; WITH raw_header_map AS ( SELECT DISTINCT NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(CAST(hr.[caseId] AS nvarchar(255)))), '''') AS case_id, NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(CAST(hr.[invoiceNumber] AS nvarchar(255)))), '''') AS invoice_number, bu.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME] AS business_unit_name FROM [dbo].[tbl_softco_ap_invoice_header_raw] hr OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP (1) bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME] FROM [dbo].[tbl_bu_details] bd WHERE UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME]))) = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(hr.[organisation]))) OR UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_CODE]))) = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(hr.[organisation]))) ORDER BY bd.[LEDGER_ID], bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME], bd.[BUSINESS_UNIT_CODE] ) bu ), failed_invoice AS ( SELECT DISTINCT h.[batchId], h.[Invoice ID] FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] h INNER JOIN raw_header_map m ON ISNULL(m.[invoice_number], '''') = ISNULL(h.[Invoice Number], '''') AND ISNULL(m.[business_unit_name], '''') = ISNULL(h.[Business Unit], '''') INNER JOIN [dbo].[vw_softco_ap_invoice_line_transformed] l ON l.[case_id] = m.[case_id] AND l.[invoice_number] = m.[invoice_number] WHERE h.[batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') AND ISNULL(l.[validation_status], '''') <> ''Validation Success'' ) DELETE h FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] h INNER JOIN failed_invoice f ON f.[batchId] = h.[batchId] AND f.[Invoice ID] = h.[Invoice ID];')

@concat('MERGE [dbo].[tbl_integration_delivery_group] AS tgt USING ( SELECT [batchId] AS batch_id, [Source] AS source_system, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_entity_name, ''' AS entity_name, [Business Unit] AS business_unit_name, [ledger_id], COUNT(*) AS header_row_count FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] WHERE [batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') AND [ValidationStatus] = ''Validation Success'' GROUP BY [batchId], [Source], [Business Unit], [ledger_id] ) AS src ON tgt.[batch_id] = src.batch_id AND tgt.[source_system] = src.source_system AND tgt.[business_unit_name] = src.business_unit_name AND tgt.[ledger_id] = src.[ledger_id] WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET [header_row_count] = src.header_row_count, [group_status] = ''Ready'', [updated_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ([batch_id],[source_system],[entity_name],[business_unit_name],[ledger_id],[header_row_count],[group_status],[created_at_utc],[updated_at_utc]) VALUES (src.batch_id, src.source_system, src.entity_name, src.business_unit_name, src.ledger_id, src.header_row_count, ''Ready'', SYSUTCDATETIME(), SYSUTCDATETIME()); UPDATE dg SET [line_row_count] = ls.line_row_count, [updated_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME() FROM [dbo].[tbl_integration_delivery_group] dg INNER JOIN ( SELECT h.[batchId] AS batch_id, h.[Source] AS source_system, h.[Business Unit] AS business_unit_name, h.[ledger_id], COUNT(*) AS line_row_count FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_lines_staging] l INNER JOIN [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] h ON h.[Invoice ID] = l.[Invoice ID] AND h.[batchId] = l.[batchId] WHERE h.[batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') AND l.[ValidationStatus] = ''Validation Success'' GROUP BY h.[batchId], h.[Source], h.[Business Unit], h.[ledger_id] ) ls ON dg.[batch_id] = ls.batch_id AND dg.[source_system] = ls.source_system AND dg.[business_unit_name] = ls.business_unit_name AND dg.[ledger_id] = ls.[ledger_id]; UPDATE h SET [delivery_group_id] = dg.[delivery_group_id] FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] h INNER JOIN [dbo].[tbl_integration_delivery_group] dg ON dg.[batch_id] = h.[batchId] AND dg.[source_system] = h.[Source] AND dg.[business_unit_name] = h.[Business Unit] AND dg.[ledger_id] = h.[ledger_id] WHERE h.[batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, '''); UPDATE l SET [delivery_group_id] = h.[delivery_group_id], [ledger_id] = h.[ledger_id] FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_lines_staging] l INNER JOIN [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] h ON h.[Invoice ID] = l.[Invoice ID] AND h.[batchId] = l.[batchId] WHERE l.[batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''');')

@concat('MERGE [dbo].[tbl_integration_document_status] AS tgt USING ( SELECT [batch_id],[delivery_group_id],[source_system],[entity_name],[business_unit_name],[ledger_id],[staging_record_id],[document_number],[counterparty_reference],[metadata_unique_identifier],[document_status],[status_message] FROM ( SELECT h.[batchId] AS batch_id, h.[delivery_group_id], h.[source_system], h.[entity_name], h.[Business Unit] AS business_unit_name, h.[ledger_id], h.[Invoice ID] AS staging_record_id, h.[Invoice Number] AS document_number, h.[Supplier Number] AS counterparty_reference, h.[MetadataUniqueIdentifies] AS metadata_unique_identifier, ''Ready For Delivery'' AS document_status, h.[validation_reason] AS status_message, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY h.[batchId], h.[source_system], h.[entity_name], h.[Invoice Number], h.[MetadataUniqueIdentifies] ORDER BY h.[Invoice ID] DESC ) AS row_priority FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] h WHERE h.[batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') ) seeded_source WHERE [row_priority] = 1 ) AS src ON tgt.[batch_id] = src.[batch_id] AND tgt.[source_system] = src.[source_system] AND tgt.[entity_name] = src.[entity_name] AND tgt.[document_number] = src.[document_number] AND ISNULL(tgt.[metadata_unique_identifier], '''') = ISNULL(src.[metadata_unique_identifier], '''') WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET [delivery_group_id] = src.[delivery_group_id], [business_unit_name] = src.[business_unit_name], [ledger_id] = src.[ledger_id], [staging_record_id] = src.[staging_record_id], [counterparty_reference] = src.[counterparty_reference], [document_status] = src.[document_status], [status_message] = src.[status_message], [last_updated_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ([batch_id],[delivery_group_id],[source_system],[entity_name],[business_unit_name],[ledger_id],[staging_record_id],[document_number],[counterparty_reference],[metadata_unique_identifier],[document_status],[status_message],[first_seen_at_utc],[last_updated_at_utc]) VALUES (src.[batch_id], src.[delivery_group_id], src.[source_system], src.[entity_name], src.[business_unit_name], src.[ledger_id], src.[staging_record_id], src.[document_number], src.[counterparty_reference], src.[metadata_unique_identifier], src.[document_status], src.[status_message], SYSUTCDATETIME(), SYSUTCDATETIME());')

@concat('WITH line_failures AS ( SELECT TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') AS [batch_id], CAST(NULL AS bigint) AS [delivery_group_id], ''', pipeline().parameters.p_entity_name, ''' AS [entity_name], l.[invoice_number] AS [document_number], hv.[supplier_number] AS [counterparty_reference], ''', pipeline().parameters.p_source_system, ''' AS [source_name], ''VALIDATION'' AS [process_stage], ''FAILED'' AS [execution_status], ''VALIDATION_ERROR'' AS [reason_code], LEFT(STRING_AGG(l.[validation_reason], '' ; ''), 1000) AS [reason_message] FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT l.[case_id], l.[invoice_number], CAST(l.[validation_reason] AS nvarchar(max)) AS [validation_reason] FROM [dbo].[vw_softco_ap_invoice_line_transformed] l WHERE ISNULL(l.[validation_status], '''') <> ''Validation Success'' AND NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(CAST(l.[validation_reason] AS nvarchar(max)))), '''') IS NOT NULL ) l LEFT JOIN [dbo].[vw_softco_ap_invoice_header_transformed] hv ON hv.[case_id] = l.[case_id] AND hv.[invoice_number] = l.[invoice_number] GROUP BY l.[invoice_number], hv.[supplier_number] ), header_only_failures AS ( SELECT TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') AS [batch_id], CAST(NULL AS bigint) AS [delivery_group_id], ''', pipeline().parameters.p_entity_name, ''' AS [entity_name], hv.[invoice_number] AS [document_number], hv.[supplier_number] AS [counterparty_reference], ''', pipeline().parameters.p_source_system, ''' AS [source_name], ''VALIDATION'' AS [process_stage], ''FAILED'' AS [execution_status], ''VALIDATION_ERROR'' AS [reason_code], LEFT(CAST(hv.[validation_reason] AS nvarchar(max)), 1000) AS [reason_message] FROM [dbo].[vw_softco_ap_invoice_header_transformed] hv WHERE ISNULL(hv.[validation_status], '''') <> ''Validation Success'' AND NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(CAST(hv.[validation_reason] AS nvarchar(max)))), '''') IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM [dbo].[vw_softco_ap_invoice_line_transformed] l WHERE l.[case_id] = hv.[case_id] AND l.[invoice_number] = hv.[invoice_number] ) ) MERGE [dbo].[tbl_source_notification_table] AS tgt USING ( SELECT * FROM line_failures UNION ALL SELECT * FROM header_only_failures ) AS src ON tgt.[batch_id] = src.[batch_id] AND tgt.[process_stage] = src.[process_stage] AND ISNULL(tgt.[document_number], '''') = ISNULL(src.[document_number], '''') AND ISNULL(tgt.[counterparty_reference], '''') = ISNULL(src.[counterparty_reference], '''') WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET [delivery_group_id] = src.[delivery_group_id], [entity_name] = src.[entity_name], [source_name] = src.[source_name], [execution_status] = src.[execution_status], [reason_code] = src.[reason_code], [reason_message] = src.[reason_message], [updated_at] = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ([batch_id], [delivery_group_id], [entity_name], [document_number], [counterparty_reference], [source_name], [process_stage], [execution_status], [reason_code], [reason_message], [created_at], [updated_at]) VALUES (src.[batch_id], src.[delivery_group_id], src.[entity_name], src.[document_number], src.[counterparty_reference], src.[source_name], src.[process_stage], src.[execution_status], src.[reason_code], src.[reason_message], SYSUTCDATETIME(), SYSUTCDATETIME());')

@concat('UPDATE [dbo].[tbl_integration_batch] SET [batch_status] = ''Staged'', [current_stage] = ''Delivery Groups Prepared'', [header_staging_count] = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] WHERE [batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''')), [line_staging_count] = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_lines_staging] WHERE [batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''')), [validation_failed_count] = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM [dbo].[tbl_source_notification_table] WHERE [batch_id] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') AND [process_stage] = ''VALIDATION'' AND [execution_status] = ''FAILED''), [updated_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHERE [batch_id] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''');')
